base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of armored_armadillo — a character (boss) from 1993 mega man x. Armored Armadillo — rolls-into-ball. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Armored Armadillo — rolls-into-ball; Rolling Shield weapon
